heading: Exportation of unprocessed timber from Federal lands
label: 617 Exportation of unprocessed timber from Federal lands
notes: Amendments1970—Subsec. (a). extended date for application of limitation provision from 1971 to 1973 calendar year.Pub. L. 91–609
amendments: Amendments1970—Subsec. (a). extended date for application of limitation provision from 1971 to 1973 calendar year.Pub. L. 91–609

children.heading: Limitation of quantity available for export
children.label: a Limitation of quantity available for export
children.text: For each of the calendar years 1969 through 1973, inclusive, not more than 350 million board feet, in the aggregate, of unprocessed timber may be sold for export from the United States from Federal lands located west of the 100th meridian.

children.heading: Surplus quantities and species available for export; public hearing; administrative finding
children.label: b Surplus quantities and species available for export; public hearing; administrative finding
children.text: After public hearing and a finding by the appropriate Secretary of the department administering Federal lands referred to in subsection (a) that specific quantities and species of unprocessed timber are surplus to the needs of domestic users and processors, such quantities and species may be designated by the said Secretary as available for export from the United States in addition to that quantity stated in subsection (a).

children.heading: Rules and regulations; prevention of substitution of Federal for non-Federal timber
children.label: c Rules and regulations; prevention of substitution of Federal for non-Federal timber
children.text: The Secretaries of the departments administering lands referred to in subsection (a) may issue rules and regulations to carry out the purposes of this section, including the prevention of substitution of timber restricted from export by this section for exported non-Federal timber.

children.heading: Limitations inapplicable to sales of prescribed minimum value
children.label: d Limitations inapplicable to sales of prescribed minimum value
children.text: In issuing rules and regulations pursuant to subsection (c), the appropriate Secretaries may include therein provisions authorizing the said Secretaries, in their discretion, to exclude from the limitations imposed by this section sales having an appraised value of less than $2,000.
